clips.title: Add emoji + conflict/drama hooks
clips.body: Top creators use 😂😱🤣 + comparison/trolling/leak language ('Kai Leaks Speed's Number', 'Trolls iShowSpeed', 'Tries Barking Like Speed'). Your titles are passive ('That fit hits different', 'Silky Respects Loyalty'). Reframe: 'Kai TROLLS Spee

clips.title: Name both streamers + the moment type
clips.body: Your best performer ('Agent Rates Emily Among Top IRL Streamers' — 1002 views) is still vague. Compare to niche winners: 'Kai Cenat & iShowSpeed Play English or Spanish' (4.9M views) — dual names + activity. Your weak shorts omit names enti

clips.title: Consolidate to 5–6 posts per week
clips.body: You posted 10 Shorts in 7 days (1.4/day); your best shorts (1306, 1117, 1002 views) are 1–2 days old and took off immediately. Posting too frequently dilutes momentum. Post 5–6 per week on fixed days (Mon/Wed/Fri/Sat), giving each Short 48+

stories.title: Lead with emoji-driven danger signals
stories.body: Top performers like 'Oh Snap' open with 😰 🚨 #text hooks that trigger immediate cognitive friction. Your titles ('I Bullied,' 'Quiet Kid') bury the stakes—rewrite to 'POV: Your Best Friend's Text Just Said THIS 😰' or 'Don't Accept That Reque

stories.title: Fix niche misalignment in metadata
stories.body: You're claiming 'minecraft parkour story time pov reddit' but posting school bathroom/bully narratives with zero Minecraft/parkour content. Competitors like 'Story Time Network' lean hard into #minecraft #pov #shorts tags. Pick one vertical

stories.title: Test 3-per-day posting during peak hours
stories.body: You're posting 9 shorts/week (1.3/day) with zero comment traction on fresh uploads, while 'Oh Snap' dominates with high-velocity drops. Your 1-2 day old shorts plateau at 5-17 views—batch-record 3 shorts with strong hooks, post at 6-9am and

characters.title: Add Visual Stakes & Conflict to Titles
characters.body: Top creators use "VS" (battle framing) and character names in caps (TRALALERO TRALALA VS BOMBARDIRO CROCODILO). You're burying conflict in narrative prose ("Gone Wrong," "Betrayal") instead of punchy opposition. Test: "CAPPUCCINO VS CROCODI

characters.title: Switch to Minecraft or Visual Game Engine
characters.body: Every top performer (MENGCRAFT STUDIOS: 1.1M+ views) uses Minecraft, BeamNG, or animation—not pure dialogue/text. Your shorts generate 0 comments and minimal engagement because there's no visual hook. You're relying on brainrot dialogue alo

characters.title: Consolidate Posts, Test 3x Per Week Max
characters.body: You posted 9 shorts in 7 days (averaging 18 views each = 162 total reach). Top creators post less frequently but with higher production value (Minecraft clips take time). Cut to 3 shorts/week, invest 2-3x longer on each title/thumbnail/visu
